Build-Depends: debhelper-compat (= 13), dh-sequence-python3, pybuild-plugin-pyproject, python3-all, python3-click, python3-fastjsonschema, python3-jsonschema, python3-pytest <!nocheck>, python3-requests, python3-requests-mock <!nocheck>, python3-referencing, python3-setuptools, python3-stac-pydantic, python3-tqdm, python3-yaml
Description: Python package to validate STAC files stac-validator is a library and cli tool for validating SpatioTemporal Asset Catalogs (STAC). It is written in Python and can be used to validate STAC Items, Collections, and Catalogs.
Package-List: python3-stac-validator deb python optional arch=all stac-validator deb utils optional arch=all
